viewpoints: Only people with very low or very high IQ can profit in crypto
Some individuals are 'forces of nature' with cosmic assistance
Success can come without effort for certain people
The universe may favor specific individuals
Natural limitations exist that are divinely placed
takeaways: Success in crypto may require either extreme simplicity or high intelligence
Recognize when someone has natural advantages beyond normal effort
Accept that some people may have inherent cosmic support
Don't assume all success comes from hard work alone
Understand that natural limitations may be part of a larger design
